title: Annual Academic Sessions 2026 – Registration Now Open
excerpt: Members are invited to register for the forthcoming Annual Academic Sessions of the Sri Lanka College of Radiologists, scheduled to be held in July 2026 at the BMICH, Colombo. Early-bird registration closes 15 June.

title: Sri Lanka Radiology Congress 2026 – Call for Abstracts
excerpt: The organizing committee invites submission of original research abstracts for presentation at the Sri Lanka Radiology Congress 2026. Deadline for abstract submission is 30 June 2026.

title: New Clinical Guidelines for Contrast Media Administration Released
excerpt: The SLCR has released updated clinical guidelines for the safe administration of contrast media in CT and MRI procedures across Sri Lankan hospitals and imaging centres.

title: Fellowship Examination Results – March 2026 Sitting
excerpt: The Board of Examiners is pleased to announce the results of the Fellowship Examination conducted in March 2026. Congratulations to all successful candidates.
